title: AI Implications for Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear Defense Policy and Programs: A Strategic Analytic Research Agenda
summary_en: Artificial intelligence is reshaping chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear deterrence, posing new risks and opportunities. This paper outlines a roadmap to guide research and policy on challenges amid rising global technological rivalry.
title_cn: [待翻译] AI Implications for Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear Defense Policy and Programs: A Strategic Analytic Research Agenda

title: Could Deep Sea Mining Break China's Grip on Critical Minerals?
summary_en: What look like seabed rocks are polymetallic nodules, rich in the minerals that drive modern economies. They could help break U.S. reliance on China, which controls the market. But nobody has ever mined seabed nodules at scale, much less processed them for industrial use.
title_cn: [待翻译] Could Deep Sea Mining Break China's Grip on Critical Minerals?

title: Infinite Potential—Insights from the Business and Civil Society Scenario: After-Action Report from a Sequence of Day After Artificial General Intelligence Exercises
summary_en: This report describes a series of exercises run with the Business and Civil Society scenario on the Infinite Potential platform. Players took on roles as business and civil society leaders and tackled challenges arising from artificial intelligence.
title_cn: [待翻译] Infinite Potential—Insights from the Business and Civil Society Scenario: After-Action Report from a Sequence of Day After Artificial General Intelligence Exercises
